name: Proxy Download via OneDriveStandaloneUpdater
description: Detects modifications to the OneDriveStandaloneUpdater registry value (UpdateRingSettingURLFromOC). This registry key can be abused to redirect OneDrive updates to a malicious server, potentially leading to the download of malware.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry value set event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Registry value set (13).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The full path of the modified registry key, 'SOFTWARE\Microsoft\OneDrive\UpdateOfficeConfig\UpdateRingSettingURLFromOC'.

parameters.name: registry_value_type
parameters.description: The type of data being written to the registry (e.g., REG_SZ, REG_DWORD).

parameters.name: registry_value
parameters.description: The actual data written to the registry, which represents the new update URL.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the registry modification.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
